# DS 6050: Deep Learning — University of Virginia, School of Data Science

> A free, open graduate deep learning course by Heman Shakeri (Shakeri Lab, UVA):
> video lectures, Dive into Deep Learning (D2L) readings, and hands-on PyTorch
> Colab notebooks, from linear models to transformers and generative AI.

Site: https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/
YouTube playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLwZv_wzaKu3vzW88m6ASKemCTb70ukycH
Textbook: https://d2l.ai (Dive into Deep Learning — canonical reading for Modules 1–9)
License: original materials CC BY 4.0; lecture videos © Heman Shakeri

## Modules

- [Module 1 – Introduction to Deep Learning](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/module/1/)
- [Module 2 – Backpropagation](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/module/2/)
- [Module 3 – Optimization Foundations & Ablation Methodology](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/module/3/)
- [Module 4 – Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs)](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/module/4/)
- [Module 5 – Advanced CNN Architectures](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/module/5/)
- [Module 6 – Encoder Decoder Architectures](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/module/6/)
- [Module 7 – Recurrent Neural Networks](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/module/7/)
- [Module 8 – Attention Mechanism](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/module/8/)
- [Module 9 – Transformer](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/module/9/)
- [Module 10 – Transformer Models in Vision and Text](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/module/10/)
- [Module 11 – Prompting, PEFT, and Quantization (Gemma)](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/module/11/)
- [Module 12 – Multimodal Learning & GenAI](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/module/12/)

## Other pages

- [Start Here](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/start-here/): prerequisites, pacing, how to use the course
- [Syllabus](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/syllabus/): course structure and philosophy
- [Resources](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/resources/): curated external books, courses, tools
- [Setup](https://shakeri-lab.github.io/dl-course-site/setup/): Python/PyTorch/Colab environment guide
